section.h1:
Register Your Shipment
With One Form
section.p: سجّل شحنتك بسهولة وتابع حالة طلبك
Submit your import or export shipment details. Our customs team will review and respond within 1–2 business days.

div.p: Fill in shipment details and available documents. Takes less than 5 minutes.
Our customs team verifies all information and checks Saudi regulatory requirements.
Receive email confirmation. A clearance order is created and you are notified immediately.
Fields marked * are required
Clearance Type

textarea.placeholder: Describe goods in detail: names, models, materials, intended use...

div.label: HS Codes الأرمزة الجمركية
div.span: Separate codes with commas. Leave blank if unknown.

div.p: Saudi References (if already obtained)
Tick all documents you have ready.

div.span: Please read, agree, and upload the signed contract before submitting.

div.p:
1. Scope of Service
The Company agrees to provide customs clearance and brokerage services for shipments declared by the Client, in accordance with Saudi Customs Authority (ZATCA) regulations and applicable Saudi trade laws.

2. Client Responsibilities
The Client shall provide accurate and complete documentation (Bill of Lading, Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Certificate of Origin, and all regulatory approvals) prior to shipment arrival. Any delay due to missing or incorrect documents is the Client's responsibility.

3. Fees and Payment
Service fees shall be as agreed in the official quotation issued by the Company. Additional government duties, ZATCA fees, and storage charges are the Client's responsibility and billed separately. Payment is due within 7 days of invoice issuance.

4. Liability
The Company shall not be liable for delays, fines, or confiscation caused by incomplete declarations, regulatory violations by the Client, or force-majeure events. Maximum liability is limited to the service fee paid for the specific shipment.

5. Confidentiality
Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of all commercial and customs data shared under this agreement, in compliance with Saudi data protection regulations.

6. Governing Law
This agreement is governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Disputes shall be resolved through the competent commercial courts of Riyadh.

7. Duration
This contract is valid for one (1) year from the date of signing and renews automatically unless terminated in writing by either party with 30 days notice.

div.span: → Print, sign, scan, then upload below

label.span: I have read and agree to the Service Contract Terms above. I confirm that all information provided is accurate and authorise the Company to proceed with customs clearance on my behalf. Required

textarea.placeholder: Any other documents or special requirements...

div.p: تم تقديم طلبك بنجاح

Our team will review your request within 1–2 business days.
A confirmation email has been sent to you.
Enter your reference number or token to check status

t.t: Track Your Request — Customs Clearance Portal

div.p: Enter your reference number or tracking token to check the status of your customs clearance request.
div.div: Search by name / phone • Submit new request

div.p:
No request found for:
Please check your reference number or tracking token.

div.t-attf-class: trk-prog-step #{req.state == 'approved' and 'done' or req.state == 'rejected' and 'cancelled' or 'pending'}

div.strong: Service Offer Awaiting Your Response — عرض خدمات بانتظار ردك
div.p: We have sent you a service offer with our fee estimate. Please review and confirm to proceed.
Your request requires corrections. Review the reason below and resubmit.

div.strong: Your request is being reviewed — طلبك قيد المراجعة
div.p: Our customs team typically responds within 1–2 business days. You will receive an email when a decision is made.
* CIF = Cost + Insurance + Freight (base for customs duty calculation)

t.t-if: clearance.requires_saber or clearance.requires_sfda or clearance.requires_citc or clearance.requires_saso or clearance.requires_moi

t.p: * Customs duties assessed by ZATCA. VAT on service fee only.

div.t-attf-style: #{req.offer_state == 'accepted' and 'background:#f0fdf4;border:1px solid #a7d9b5;' or req.offer_state == 'rejected' and 'background:#fdedec;border:1px solid #f5b0a8;' or 'background:#f0f9ff;border:1px solid #bae6fd;'}

t.p: Awaiting your response — use the buttons above.
✅ Offer Accepted — Our team will contact you for payment.
❌ Offer Declined — Please contact us to discuss revised terms.

div.div: Clearance order created and assigned to processing team.
Request requires corrections. Details sent to .
Service Offer Sent — تم إرسال عرض الخدمات
ACD Submitted — تم تقديم بيان ACD
Customs declaration filed with Saudi Customs via FASAH.

t.t-if: clearance and clearance.state in ('duty_payment','released','delivered') and clearance.inspection_lane

div.div: Duty Payment Confirmed — تم تأكيد سداد الرسوم
Customs clearance complete. Goods released for pickup or delivery.
Our team will notify you by email.
📋 Document Checklist — قائمة المستندات Tick a document to attach its file

t.t: Track My Requests — Customs Clearance Portal

div.p: Search by your name or phone number to see all your submitted requests and their current status.

div.h3: Search Your Requests / ابحث عن طلباتك

div.p: No requests found. Please check the name or phone number and try again.
شكرًا لقبولك عرضنا

t.p: You have already accepted this offer. Our team will be in touch shortly.
Thank you! Your acceptance has been recorded. Our customs team will contact you shortly to confirm next steps and payment arrangements.

div.p: تم رفض العرض

t.p: You have already responded to this offer.
We have noted your decision. If you would like to discuss the terms or submit a new request, please contact us or resubmit via the portal.

div.p: This offer link is invalid or has expired. Please contact our team for assistance.
Customs Clearance KSA — ZATCA · FASAH · SABER Compliant
